items.name_cn:
Siena Shoulder Bag
▫️Model 846705 Black
▫️Dimensions 22.5*14*8
The Gucci Siena small shoulder bag continues the evolution of the brand's iconic Horsebit element. Crafted from fine glossy leather, this bag features a structured silhouette with a half-horsebit buckle detail inspired by the 1970s. It is accented with gold-tone hardware and features a three-compartment interior with a zip pocket.

items.name_en: The new GG Marmont series is renowned for its signature quilted leather and interlocking GG accessories. On this small shoulder bag, classic materials are combined with vertical and diagonal patterns to create a unique geometric design ✨Model: 443497Dimensions: W26*H15*D7cm

items.name_en: With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Bucket Bag
items.name_cn:
With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Bucket Bag
The new small leather goods series playfully uses vibrant colors to present eye-catching new works. This bucket bag features a classic drawstring closure design paired with a practical and versatile chain shoulder strap.
Model: 783175
Size: 14✖️17✖️13cm
Color: Brown/Light Blue Canvas

items.name_en: With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Shoulder Bag
This piece is from the Gucci Lido series, inspired by the summer vibes and beach clubs of the Italian coast. The new small leather goods series playfully uses vibrant colors to present eye-catching new works. This shoulder bag features a classic silhouette, cleverly paired with a button closure and internal hook clasp for easy attachment of matching wallets or clutches. The new light blue and brown GG canvas complements the brown leather trim, while the double-G accessories add a bright touch.
Model: 783141.
Size: 16.5(W)x 9.5(H)x 4.5cm(D)
Color: Brown/Light Blue Canvas.

items.name_en: With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Marmont series small denim shoulder bag
items.name_cn:
With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Marmont series small denim shoulder bag
This piece is from the Gucci Lido series, inspired by the summer vibes and beach clubs of the Italian coast. This small chain shoulder bag from the GG Marmont series features a soft yet structured design, equipped with a large flap buckle decorated with double-G accessories. The chain shoulder strap is ingeniously designed, offering versatile carrying methods that allow for free switching between shoulder and handbag styles.
Model: 443497.
Size: 26(W)x 15(H)x 7cm(D)
Color: Brown/Light Blue Canvas.
